texto: Pain can mask itself as a righteous companion
autor: silently forming a barrier between you & all that is good for you. Identify Pain. Now thank Pain for showing you that all of your senses & emotions are working as you send him on his way. Traveling with pain can slow you down & limit the distance you travel.
explicacao: Citação de silently forming a barrier between you & all that is good for you. Identify Pain. Now thank Pain for showing you that all of your senses & emotions are working as you send him on his way. Traveling with pain can slow you down & limit the distance you travel. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Pain can mask itself as a righteous companion” articula reflexao, sanjo-jendayi, itself em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.
